message:
fix(vdbe,core): harden time-travel queries to reject empty VersionStore fallback (#23)

Replace silent fallback-to-current-data behavior in TimeTravelPageIo
with an explicit error when the MVCC VersionStore is empty. This
prevents time-travel queries from silently returning incorrect current
data in compatibility mode.

Key changes:
- TimeTravelPageIo::read_page: check VersionStore page_count before
  fallthrough; return explicit "historical data not available" error
  when the store is empty
- Fix missing imports (TimeTravelTarget, create_time_travel_snapshot)
  and replace non-existent parse_datetime_to_unix_ns with explicit
  unsupported error
- Update SetSnapshot test to wire CommitLog and GC horizon (required
  by the validated SetSnapshot path)
- Add unit tests for empty-VersionStore rejection and populated-store
  fallthrough behavior
- Update connection-level time-travel tests to assert error behavior
  instead of accepting silent fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
